hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'downloaded_cases/'; then echo 'BLOCK: 資料檔案請用 Python 腳本處理，勿直接編輯' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'supabase/migrations/' && [ -f "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" ]; then echo 'BLOCK: Migration 檔案為唯讀（append-only）。請建立新的 migration 檔案，勿修改已存在的版本' >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(run\.py search|run\.py download|postprocess\.py)'; then echo '提醒: 長時間爬蟲/處理任務，建議在 tmux 中執行'; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then ruff check --fix --silent "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; ruff format --quiet "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.py$' && grep -n '^[[:space:]]*print(' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '注意: 檔案中有 print() 語句，考慮改用 logging'; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'frontend/src/.*\.(ts|tsx)$' && grep -qE 'console\.log\(' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; then count=$(grep -cE 'console\.log\(' "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); echo "注意: 檔案中有 ${count} 處 console.log()，上線前請移除或改用 console.debug()"; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'i18n/locales/(en|zh-TW)\.json$'; then python3 -c "
import json, sys
try:
    en = json.load(open('/Users/d/Developer/IMMI-Case-/frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json'))
    tw = json.load(open('/Users/d/Developer/IMMI-Case-/frontend/src/i18n/locales/zh-TW.json'))
    en_k, tw_k = set(en.keys()), set(tw.keys())
    missing_tw = en_k - tw_k
    missing_en = tw_k - en_k
    if missing_tw:
        print(f'⚠️  zh-TW 缺少 {len(missing_tw)} 個頂層 key: {\", \".join(sorted(missing_tw)[:5])}')
    elif missing_en:
        print(f'⚠️  en 缺少 {len(missing_en)} 個頂層 key: {\", \".join(sorted(missing_en)[:5])}')
    else:
        print(f'✓ i18n 同步: en={len(en_k)} zh-TW={len(tw_k)} 頂層 key 一致')
except Exception as e:
    print(f'i18n 檢查失敗: {e}')
" 2>&1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q 'web/routes/api.py'; then lines=$(wc -l < "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$lines" -gt 4500 ]; then echo "⚠️  api.py 已達 ${lines} 行（超過 4500 行門檻），考慮拆分為子模組"; fi; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.html$'; then python3 -c "from jinja2 import Environment; Environment().parse(open('$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH').read())" 2>&1 | head -3; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_COMMAND" | grep -qE 'to_csv|immigration_cases\.csv'; then [ -f downloaded_cases/immigration_cases.csv ] && cp downloaded_cases/immigration_cases.csv downloaded_cases/immigration_cases.csv.bak 2>/dev/null && echo 'CSV 已自動備份為 .csv.bak'; fi
cd /Users/d/Developer/IMMI-Case- && if git diff --stat HEAD 2>/dev/null | grep -q '.'; then echo '有未提交的程式碼變更'; git diff --stat HEAD; fi
